message:
audit: fcp-graphql clean for graphql-local code

Reviewed 5b0c0d9a, cd6b9442, plus client.rs/error.rs surface.
Error-path body truncation (cd6b9442) correctly slices bytes before
UTF-8 conversion; sensitive-header redaction in Debug; PoolExhausted
mapped through HttpErrorInfo cleanly. One MEDIUM concern is the
success-path response.body Vec<u8>: graphql neither caps nor inspects
size before returning it to the caller, so any cap must live in the
shared asupersync HTTP transport. That's a transport-layer audit, not
a graphql-local fix. parse_retry_after (client.rs:628) only handles
delta-seconds, not RFC 7231 HTTP-date form — LOW, polite-backoff only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
